sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106882" key="u(panamimnh/skomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπανα-μιμνήσκομαι</orth>, <sense id="n106882.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">recall to mind once more,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ πατρὸς ὑπανεμνήσθη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:157H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">157H.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (i <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:p.237" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.237</biblScope> </bibl> Chambry).</sense> </entryFree>
